history.qwen_observation: Direct upgrade from Spring Boot 2.1.6 to 3.3 failed due to breaking Reactor API changes (doAfterSuccessOrError removal and reactor.retry.Retry package relocation) that the source code still references.
history.qwen_rationale: Per the compatibility matrix, jumping straight to SB 3.3 from <=2.5 carries high regression risk. I will stepwise upgrade: first to SB 2.7 under JDK 11, then bump the build to JDK 17, and finally apply the SB 3.3 upgrade under JDK 17. This gradual path aligns with empirical migration trajectories and gives the build a chance to resolve intermediate dependency shifts before the major Jakarta/Reactor 3.4 transition.

history.qwen_observation: Compilation failed at upgrade_spring_boot_2_7 because Reactor Core 3.3+ moved reactor.retry.Retry to reactor.util.retry.Retry, and the UpgradeSpringBoot_2_7 recipe did not automatically update the imports.
history.qwen_rationale: Adding org.openrewrite.java.migrate.reactor.RetryPackageMoved to the Spring Boot 2.7 step will explicitly migrate the Retry class references and imports to the new package, resolving the type incompatibility before the build proceeds to Java 17 and Spring Boot 3.3.

history.qwen_observation: The chain failed at `upgrade_spring_boot_2_7` because `org.openrewrite.java.migrate.reactor.RetryPackageMoved` is not a valid OpenRewrite recipe FQN, causing recipe validation to abort.
history.qwen_rationale: Removing the invalid Reactor recipe allows the `UpgradeSpringBoot_2_7` meta-recipe to execute successfully, as it internally handles necessary Reactor and Spring framework migrations. The rest of the chain follows the standard JDK 11→21 progression with Spring Boot 2.x→3.x upgrades aligned to the compatibility matrix.

history.qwen_observation: upgrade_spring_boot_2_7 failed compilation due to Reactor Retry package migration (reactor.retry vs reactor.util.retry) causing type mismatches.
history.qwen_rationale: Skipping the intermediate SB 2.7 step avoids the fragile Reactor 3.3/3.4 transition point. Following the prompt's guidance for SB 2.x -> Java 21 migrations, we replace upgrade_build_to_java17 with UpgradeSpringBoot_3_3 at JDK 17. The SB 3.3 meta-recipe includes comprehensive Reactor and Jakarta migrations that should handle the Retry package move and other API shifts in one pass, then we proceed to Java 21.

history.qwen_observation: The Spring Boot 3.3 upgrade recipe updated the POM but failed to migrate deprecated Reactor APIs (doAfterSuccessOrError, reactor.retry.Retry), causing post-recipe compilation failure.
history.qwen_rationale: Inserting SpringBoot3BestPractices immediately after the version bump helps catch remaining framework-specific deprecations. Following the recommended template structure with the SB 3.3 step replacing the Java 17 build upgrade ensures the framework transition happens at the correct JDK boundary, maximizing recipe coverage before proceeding to Java 21.
